page: Microsoft Azure E32ads_v6 is a memory-optimized server belonging to the Eadv6 family, designed for workloads requiring substantial memory capacity relative to compute resources. The instance is powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor based on the x86_64 architecture, delivering 32 dedicated vCPUs derived from 16 physical cores with multithreading enabled. Operating at a clock speed of 3.7 GHz, the processor features a cache hierarchy including 32 KB L1d, 1.0 MB L2, and 32 MB L3 cache. The hardware configuration is completed by 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding 8.0 GB of memory per vCPU, and 1890 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capabilities.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core capabilities, with both stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores placing in the top 25% of tested servers. Multi-core performance is balanced, registering as average in stress-ng and Passmark CPU tests, but showing strong results in Geekbench multi-core evaluations. Cryptographic execution is a notable strength, supported by hardware-accelerated AES and SHA instructions. Memory performance is robust, highlighted by a strong Passmark memory score, though raw memory bandwidth for large blocks remains within average parameters. Additionally, the processor demonstrates top-tier efficiency in text generation for small language models.

With its 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and integrated high-capacity local storage, this server offers a resource-dense profile for memory-bound applications without the overhead of a dedicated GPU. The system is engineered to support demanding enterprise workloads. It is highly suited for relational database management systems, in-memory caching platforms such as Redis, software compilation, and data analytics pipelines.
description: Microsoft Azure E32ads_v6 is a memory-optimized server from the Eadv6 family, featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor running at 3.7 GHz, this x86_64 architecture instance includes 1890 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. Benchmark data indicates strong single-core and multi-core Geekbench performance, alongside top-tier text generation speeds for small language models. With a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, it provides a balanced profile for memory-heavy workloads. It is highly suited for database operations, in-memory caching, and data processing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E32ads_v6 is a memory-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 1890 GB of local storage, delivering strong single-core and cryptographic performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E32ads_v6 is a memory-optimized server with 32 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage for database and memory-heavy tasks.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86 server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors, high-capacity local storage, and strong single-core performance.
bullet_points: Equipped with 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor at 3.7 GHz
Provides 256.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
Includes 1890 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Demonstrates strong single-core CPU and memory benchmark performance
Optimized for memory-intensive workloads, databases, and in-memory caching
